# User settings

Each member can manage their own account from **Settings** in the account menu.

[← Back to features](README.md)

| Page | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| Profile | Name and email |
| Password | Change password |
| Appearance | Light, dark, or system theme |
| Notifications | [Community digest](community-digest.md) opt-in/out |
| Privacy | Accept privacy policy; export personal data as JSON |
| Two-factor authentication | Enable TOTP-based 2FA with recovery codes |

Privacy and data export are described further in [Privacy and GDPR](privacy-and-gdpr.md).
